articles.title: Broadcom signs long-term deal to develop Google’s custom AI chips
articles.description: April 6 (Reuters) - Broadcom said ⁠on Monday it has signed a long-term agreement with ⁠Google to develop and supply future generations of custom ‌artificial intelligence chips and other components for the company's next-generation AI racks through 2031.

articles.title: Uno faculty named to NSF fellowship expanding AI education
articles.description: UNO assistant professor Chun-Hua Tsai is named an inaugural NAIRR AI Education Fellow, advancing equitable access to high-quality undergraduate AI education nationwide.

articles.title: Skills: The common language of human
articles.description: During a recent webinar, DJ Park of Cornerstone OnDemand explored how AI-powered intelligence is transforming traditional HR into hybrid resource management.
articles.content: The traditional boundaries of human resources are undergoing a radical transformation as AI moves from a speculative tool to an integrated “colleague” within the workforce. During a recent webinar co-hosted by Cornerstone OnDemand and HRM Asia, DJ Pa... [3426 chars]

articles.title: Samsung Q1 profit soars 8x to record high as AI chip boom drives prices
articles.description: Samsung Electronics expects a record first-quarter profit, surging over eightfold as booming AI chip demand tightens supply and drives up semiconductor prices globally
articles.content: Samsung Electronics on Tuesday projected a record-breaking first-quarter performance, with operating profit surging more than eightfold year-on-year, as a global rush to build artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure tightened chip supply and push... [2142 chars]

articles.title: Tech firms take foot off hiring pedal on AI turn
articles.description: India’s tech sector had 256,000 active job openings in April 2022—thanks to the post-pandemic surge in IT services--and accounted for 83% of all hiring in the country.
articles.content:
Synopsis
India’s tech sector had 256,000 active job openings in April 2022—thanks to the post-pandemic surge in IT services--and accounted for 83% of all hiring in the country.
Tech hiring has taken a hit at a time when companies are shedding staff, ... [3483 chars]

articles.title: ET Graphics: Future of search is on fast track
articles.description: ​​A new realm is now developing alongside it. Generative engine optimisation (GEO) is about being the source that AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google’s AI Overviews draw from when they answer a question. Not a link in a list, the answer itself.
